title: Xtra Juicy Mexican Blueberry Tacos
description: A sweet and savory Mexican dish featuring blueberries, roast, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients, this nostalgic Sonoran-inspired recipe is a unique twist on traditional tacos. The jammy and juicy blueberries add a burst of flavor and texture to this delicious dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the blueberries, honey, lime juice, cinnamon, and salt.
Arrange the tortillas on a baking sheet and warm them in the oven for 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the melted coconut oil and vanilla extract.
Brush the coconut oil mixture onto the warmed tortillas.
Spoon the blueberry mixture onto the center of each tortilla.
Sprinkle the chopped roasted pecans over the blueberry mixture.
Fold the tortillas in half to enclose the filling.
Serve the tacos warm and enjoy.
